description_long: This is a sleek, modern helicopter with a streamlined, aerodynamic fuselage and a dark, matte exterior finish. The helicopter features a prominent main rotor with long, slender blades and a compact tail boom ending in a circular tail rotor shroud. The cockpit is enclosed with large, curved windows that provide wide visibility for the pilot and co-pilot. The landing gear consists of sturdy, tubular skids with crossbars for stability. The body has several cutouts and vent-like features, suggesting a lightweight, high-performance design. No visible registration numbers or markings are present on the exterior.
description: A modern, dark-colored helicopter with a streamlined body, large cockpit windows, and tubular landing skids. It features a main rotor and a shrouded tail rotor for urban or tactical use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the helicopter's symmetrical nose, wide cockpit windows, and the main rotor blades extending horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit window curvature, landing skids, and the circular tail rotor shroud.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, shrouded tail rotor, and the main rotor hub, with the skids visible beneath.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the streamlined body, cockpit windows, and landing skids, with the tail rotor shroud visible.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, slender main rotor blades made of composite material, colored dark gray or black, with no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: Circular shrouded tail rotor at the end of the tail boom, likely containing multiple small blades oriented perpendicular to the boom, colored dark gray.
attribute_landing_skids: Pair of tubular, black landing skids with crossbars for stability, made of metal or composite, attached to the lower fuselage.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Large, curved cockpit windows wrapping around the front and sides, tinted dark, with minimal visible framing.
